## REGLES D'EXECUTION

Sequential 10.4.1 -> 10.4.12 strict. Dependances :
- 10.4.1 (architecture + decision + plan + UX research) bloque tout sprint
- 10.4.2 (entites) bloque tous services
- 10.4.3 (QuoteWizardService) CRITIQUE bloque 10.4.4-10.4.6

- 10.4.5 (auto-approval) CRITIQUE Sprint 42 + Sprint 40 + Sprint 10/11/34 integration
- 10.4.6 (PWA Sprint 18 extension) CRITIQUE Sprint 18 framework reuse
- 10.4.7 (mobile-first responsive) parallel 10.4.6
- 10.4.8 (sharing) parallel 10.4.9 (A/B testing) parallel 10.4.10 (offline)
- 10.4.11 (admin-portal + MV) consume tous services
- 10.4.12 closure + pre-requis Sprint 44

3 tentatives max par task. Erreurs typiques :
- Sub-30s SLA achievable production-realistic monitoring
- Wizard state management multi-step navigation complex
- Pre-fill data outdated customer override workflow
- Sharing token security PII exposure CNDP
- PWA service worker conflicts Sprint 18 existing
- A/B testing variants performance fairness
- Offline sync conflicts last_write_wins data loss
- IndexedDB encryption draft_data sensitive
- Mobile virtual keyboard field type misconfiguration
- Wizard abandon detection 24h threshold tunable

### 10.4.2 -- Entites Quote Express (5 tables) (9h) | Deps : 10.4.1

1. Creer package `repo/packages/quote-express/` v1.0.0
2. Migrations 5 tables + RLS strict + indexes :
   ```sql
   CREATE TABLE quote_wizard_sessions (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     quote_id UUID REFERENCES quotes(id),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     customer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     current_step INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (current_step BETWEEN 1 AND 5),
     total_steps INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
     completed_steps JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     draft_data JSONB,
     last_activity TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
     completion_time_seconds INTEGER,
     abandoned BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
     recovery_attempted BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
     variant_id UUID,
     device_type VARCHAR CHECK (device_type IN ('mobile','tablet','desktop')),
     browser_info JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX qws_customer_step ON quote_wizard_sessions (customer_id, current_step) WHERE NOT abandoned;
   CREATE INDEX qws_abandoned ON quote_wizard_sessions (abandoned, last_activity) WHERE abandoned = true;
   CREATE INDEX qws_tenant ON quote_wizard_sessions (tenant_id, last_activity DESC);
   
   ALTER TABLE quote_wizard_sessions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY qws_tenant_isolation ON quote_wizard_sessions
     USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   
   CREATE TABLE quote_shares (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     quote_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES quotes(id),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     share_method VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (share_method IN ('url','qr','whatsapp','email','linkedin')),
     share_url VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     share_token UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE,
     accessed_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
     last_accessed_at TIMESTAMP,
     expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
     share_recipient_data JSONB,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]'
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX qs_quote ON quote_shares (quote_id);
   CREATE INDEX qs_expires ON quote_shares (expires_at) WHERE expires_at > NOW();
   ALTER TABLE quote_shares ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   ```
3. Enums TypeScript stricts (5+ enums)

5. Seeds dans `seeds/` :

### 10.4.3 -- QuoteWizardService + Multi-Step Orchestration CRITIQUE (10h) | Deps : 10.4.2

1. Service `QuoteWizardService` complete :
   ```typescript
   async createWizardSession(customerId: string, brokerInitiated: boolean = false): Promise<{ session_id: string; redirect_url: string }> {
     // Trigger Sprint 42 PreFillService background BEFORE customer arrives
     this.preFillService.initiatePreFillBackground(customerId, ['cnie','narsa','previous_policies']);
     
     // Get A/B testing variant
     const variant = await this.abTestingService.getActiveVariantForCustomer(customerId);
     
     // Create session
     const session = await this.wizardSessionRepo.save({
       customer_id: customerId,
       tenant_id: this.contextTenantId,
       current_step: 1,
       total_steps: variant?.steps_config?.total_steps || WIZARD_TOTAL_STEPS_DEFAULT,
       variant_id: variant?.id,
       device_type: this.detectDeviceType(),
       browser_info: this.detectBrowserInfo()
     });
     
     // Sprint 14 event
     this.eventEmitter.emit('wizard.session.created', { session_id: session.id, customer_id: customerId, broker_initiated: brokerInitiated });
     
     // Generate redirect URL Sprint 18 customer-portal
     const redirectUrl = `${CUSTOMER_PORTAL_BASE_URL}/quote-express/wizard?session=${session.id}`;
     
     return { session_id: session.id, redirect_url: redirectUrl };
   }
   
   async saveStep(sessionId: string, stepNumber: number, stepData: any): Promise<QuoteWizardSession> {
     return await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
       const session = await manager.findOne(QuoteWizardSession, {
         where: { id: sessionId },
         lock: { mode: 'pessimistic_write' }
       });
       
       // Validate step transitions
       if (stepNumber > session.current_step + 1) {
         throw new BadRequestException('Cannot skip steps');
       }
       
       // Validate step data per wizard state machine
       this.wizardStateMachine.validateStepData(stepNumber, stepData);
       
       // Update session
       session.draft_data = { ...session.draft_data, [`step_${stepNumber}`]: stepData };
       session.completed_steps = [...new Set([...session.completed_steps, stepNumber])];
       session.current_step = Math.max(session.current_step, stepNumber + 1);
       session.last_activity = new Date();
       
       await manager.save(session);
       
       // WizardEvent
       await manager.save(WizardEvent, {
         session_id: sessionId,
         tenant_id: this.contextTenantId,
         event_type: 'step_completed',
         step_number: stepNumber,
         event_data: { step_data_keys: Object.keys(stepData) }
       });
       
       // Sprint 14 event
       this.eventEmitter.emit('wizard.step.completed', {
         session_id: sessionId,
         step_number: stepNumber
       });
       
       return session;
     });
   }
   ```
2. Methods : createWizardSession + getWizardState + saveStep + transitionStep + saveDraft + resumeWizard + completeWizard + listAbandonedSessions

# C-44 -- ORCHESTRATEUR SPRINT 44 : INSURANCE PORTAGE PORTEFEUILLE T7

**Version** : v3.0

### 10.5.2 -- Entites Portage T7 (5 tables) + State Machines (9h) | Deps : 10.5.1

1. Creer package `repo/packages/insurance-portability/` v1.0.0
2. Migrations 5 tables + RLS strict + indexes + UNIQUE :
   ```sql
   CREATE TABLE portfolio_transfers (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     source_broker_tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     target_broker_tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     customer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     initiated_by VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (initiated_by IN ('source_broker','target_broker','customer','acaps_directed')),
     transfer_status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' CHECK (transfer_status IN ('draft','consent_pending','acaps_notified','insurers_notified','in_progress','commissions_pending','completed','cancelled')),
     initiated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
     completed_at TIMESTAMP,
     acaps_reference VARCHAR UNIQUE,
     acaps_notification_date TIMESTAMP,
     transfer_reason VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (transfer_reason IN ('cessation_activity','acquisition_portefeuille','retirement_broker','customer_request','other')),
     transfer_reason_details TEXT,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]'
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX pt_source ON portfolio_transfers (source_broker_tenant_id);
   CREATE INDEX pt_target ON portfolio_transfers (target_broker_tenant_id);
   CREATE INDEX pt_status ON portfolio_transfers (transfer_status) WHERE transfer_status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled');
   CREATE INDEX pt_initiated ON portfolio_transfers (initiated_at DESC);
   
   ALTER TABLE portfolio_transfers ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY pt_tenant_isolation ON portfolio_transfers
     USING (source_broker_tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid OR target_broker_tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   ```
3. State machines :
   - `src/state-machine/portfolio-transfer-state-machine.ts` 8 etats
   - `src/state-machine/consent-state-machine.ts` 4 etats
4. Enums TypeScript stricts
5. JSONB schemas Zod
6. Seeds dans `seeds/` (sample transfers + consent_requests + snapshots + reconciliations)
7. Tests 20+ entites
8. Commit : `feat(insurance-portability): task 10.5.2 entites + state machines`

### 10.5.3 -- PortfolioTransferService + Saga 8 Steps CRITIQUE (12h) | Deps : 10.5.2

1. Service `PortfolioTransferService` complete :
   ```typescript
   async initiateTransfer(sourceBrokerTenantId: string, targetBrokerTenantId: string, customerId: string, transferData: TransferData): Promise<PortfolioTransfer> {
     return await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
       // Validate brokers active + customer policies belong source
       const customerPolicies = await manager.find(Policy, {
         where: { customer_id: customerId, tenant_id: sourceBrokerTenantId }
       });
       
       if (customerPolicies.length === 0) {
         throw new BadRequestException('No policies to transfer for customer');
       }
       
       // Create PortfolioTransfer
       const transfer = await manager.save(PortfolioTransfer, {
         source_broker_tenant_id: sourceBrokerTenantId,
         target_broker_tenant_id: targetBrokerTenantId,
         customer_id: customerId,
         initiated_by: transferData.initiated_by,
         transfer_status: 'draft',
         transfer_reason: transferData.transfer_reason,
         transfer_reason_details: transferData.transfer_reason_details
       });
       
       // Create PortfolioTransferPolicy records
       for (const policy of customerPolicies) {
         await manager.save(PortfolioTransferPolicy, {
           transfer_id: transfer.id,
           policy_id: policy.id,
           tenant_id_at_transfer: sourceBrokerTenantId,
           transfer_status: 'pending'
         });
       }
       
       // State transition draft -> consent_pending
       transfer.transfer_status = 'consent_pending';
       await manager.save(transfer);
       
       // Trigger TransferConsentService
       await this.consentService.requestConsent(transfer.id, transferData.consent_method);
       
       // Sprint 14 events
       this.eventEmitter.emit('portfolio-transfer.initiated', {
         transfer_id: transfer.id,
         source_broker: sourceBrokerTenantId,
         target_broker: targetBrokerTenantId,
         customer_id: customerId
       });
       
       // Sprint 9 notifications customer + brokers
       await this.notificationService.notifyTransferInitiated(transfer);
       
       return transfer;
     });
   }
   ```
2. Methods : initiateTransfer + notifyACAPS + notifyInsurers + executeTransfer + reconcileCommissions + completeTransfer + cancelTransfer + listTransfers
3. Saga 8 steps + per-step compensations
4. State machine transitions controlled
5. Sprint 15 idempotency strict
6. Sprint 14 events 8 events per state
7. Tests 22+ scenarios
8. Commit : `feat(insurance-portability): task 10.5.3 PortfolioTransferService saga`

### 10.6.2 -- Entites Comparaison T8 (5 tables) (9h) | Deps : 10.6.1

1. Creer package `repo/packages/insurance-comparison/` v1.0.0
2. Migrations 5 tables + RLS strict + indexes + UNIQUE :
   ```sql
   CREATE TABLE comparison_requests (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     customer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     quote_id UUID,
     initiated_by VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (initiated_by IN ('customer','broker','automated')),
     comparison_criteria JSONB NOT NULL,
     insurers_queried INTEGER NOT NULL,
     completed_at TIMESTAMP,
     completion_time_seconds INTEGER,
     cache_hit BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
     acaps_reference VARCHAR UNIQUE,
     variant_id UUID,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX cr_tenant_customer ON comparison_requests (tenant_id, customer_id);
   CREATE INDEX cr_completed ON comparison_requests (completed_at DESC);
   CREATE INDEX cr_initiated_by ON comparison_requests (initiated_by);
   
   ALTER TABLE comparison_requests ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY cr_tenant_isolation ON comparison_requests
     USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   
   CREATE TABLE comparison_results (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     comparison_request_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES comparison_requests(id),
     insurer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     insurer_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     premium_amount NUMERIC(10,2),
     premium_currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'MAD',
     coverage_summary JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
     claims_payout_score NUMERIC(5,2),
     customer_satisfaction_score NUMERIC(5,2),
     financial_strength_score NUMERIC(5,2),
     transparency_score NUMERIC(5,2),
     composite_score NUMERIC(5,2),
     ranking INTEGER,
     status VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('quoted','failed','cached')),
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]'
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX cres_request ON comparison_results (comparison_request_id);
   CREATE INDEX cres_score ON comparison_results (composite_score DESC);
   
   CREATE TABLE comparison_recommendations (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     comparison_request_id UUID NOT NULL,
     recommended_insurer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     recommendation_rank INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (recommendation_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 3),
     recommendation_reasoning JSONB NOT NULL,
     recommendation_acceptance VARCHAR DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (recommendation_acceptance IN ('pending','accepted','rejected','no_response')),
     acceptance_at TIMESTAMP,
     acceptance_reason TEXT,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     UNIQUE (comparison_request_id, recommendation_rank)
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX crec_request ON comparison_recommendations (comparison_request_id);
   ```
3. Enums TypeScript stricts (ComparisonInitiator + ComparisonStatus + RecommendationAcceptance + InsurerStatus)
4. JSONB schemas Zod strict
5. Seeds (sample requests + results + recommendations + T8 docs + benchmarks)

### 10.7.2 -- Entites Renewal Advanced (9h) | Deps : 10.7.1

1. Creer package `repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/` v1.0.0
2. Migrations 5 tables + RLS strict + indexes + UNIQUE :
   ```sql
   CREATE TABLE renewal_policies (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     original_policy_id UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES policies(id),
     renewed_policy_id UUID REFERENCES policies(id),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     customer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     renewal_type VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (renewal_type IN ('automatic','manual','comparison_triggered','campaign_triggered')),
     auto_renewal_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
     opt_in_at TIMESTAMP,
     opt_out_at TIMESTAMP,
     dynamic_pricing_applied BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
     premium_previous NUMERIC(10,2),
     premium_adjusted NUMERIC(10,2),
     premium_adjustment_percent NUMERIC(5,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (
       CASE WHEN premium_previous > 0 THEN ((premium_adjusted - premium_previous) / premium_previous * 100) ELSE 0 END
     ) STORED,
     churn_score_at_renewal NUMERIC(5,2),
     incentive_applied_id UUID,
     comparison_request_id UUID,
     status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled' CHECK (status IN ('scheduled','in_progress','completed','cancelled','abandoned')),
     scheduled_for TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
     completed_at TIMESTAMP,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]'
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX rp_customer_status ON renewal_policies (customer_id, status) WHERE status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled');
   CREATE INDEX rp_scheduled ON renewal_policies (scheduled_for);
   CREATE INDEX rp_churn ON renewal_policies (churn_score_at_renewal DESC) WHERE churn_score_at_renewal IS NOT NULL;
   
   ALTER TABLE renewal_policies ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY rp_tenant_isolation ON renewal_policies
     USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   ```
3. Enums TypeScript stricts (RenewalType + RenewalStatus + IncentiveType + AcceptanceStatus + CampaignStatus)
4. JSONB schemas Zod strict (pricing_factors + customer_segment_criteria + incentives_config + audit_trail)
5. Seeds dans `seeds/`
6. Tests 20+ entites
7. Commit : `feat(insurance-renewal-advanced): task 10.7.2 5 entites + RLS + seeds`

### 10.7.3 -- AutomaticRenewalService + Sprint 41 Extension CRITIQUE (10h) | Deps : 10.7.2

1. Service `AutomaticRenewalService` complete :
   ```typescript
   async processScheduledRenewals(dateWindow: { start: Date, end: Date }): Promise<BatchProcessingResult> {
     const renewalsScheduled = await this.renewalRepo.find({
       where: {
         scheduled_for: Between(dateWindow.start, dateWindow.end),
         status: 'scheduled',
         auto_renewal_enabled: true
       },
       take: AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_BATCH_SIZE
     });
     
     // Parallel processing with concurrency control
     const results = await pMap(renewalsScheduled, async (renewal) => {
       try {
         // Sprint 42 churn evaluation
         const churnScore = await this.churnBasedRenewalService.evaluateChurnAtRenewal(renewal.original_policy_id);
         renewal.churn_score_at_renewal = churnScore;
         
         // Dynamic pricing
         const pricingDecision = await this.dynamicPricingService.calculateDynamicPremium(
           renewal.original_policy_id,
           { market_position, churn_risk: churnScore, loyalty, claims_history }
         );
         renewal.premium_adjusted = pricingDecision.adjusted_premium;
         renewal.dynamic_pricing_applied = true;
         
         // Churn-based incentives if applicable
         if (churnScore > CHURN_THRESHOLD_HIGH) {
           await this.churnBasedRenewalService.applyChurnIncentives(renewal.id, churnScore);
         }
         
         // Sprint 41 PolicyRenewalService delegation
         const renewedPolicy = await this.sprint41Service.executeRenewal({
           original_policy_id: renewal.original_policy_id,
           premium: renewal.premium_adjusted
         });
         
         renewal.renewed_policy_id = renewedPolicy.id;
         renewal.status = 'completed';
         renewal.completed_at = new Date();
         
         // Sprint 14 event
         this.eventEmitter.emit('renewal.automatic.completed', {
           renewal_id: renewal.id,
           original_policy_id: renewal.original_policy_id,
           churn_score: churnScore
         });
         
         return { success: true, renewal };
       } catch (error) {
         // Compensation rollback
         await this.cancelAutomaticRenewal(renewal.id, error.message);
         return { success: false, renewal, error };
       }
     }, { concurrency: AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_PARALLEL_CONCURRENCY });
     
     return { total: renewalsScheduled.length, success: results.filter(r => r.success).length, failures: results.filter(r => !r.success) };
   }
   ```
2. Methods : processScheduledRenewals + updateRenewalPreference + cancelAutomaticRenewal + processBulkRenewalsForCustomer + listAutomaticRenewals
3. Worker `automatic-renewal-cron.worker.ts` daily 04h00 MA batch
4. Sprint 41 PolicyRenewalService delegation
5. Per-policy idempotency Sprint 15
6. Per-policy compensations rollback
7. Sprint 14 events RenewalAutomatic*
8. Sprint 36 monitoring
9. Tests 20+ scenarios

   CREATE TABLE contract_modifications (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     policy_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES policies(id),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     customer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     modification_type VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (modification_type IN (
       'coverage_change_extension','coverage_change_reduction',
       'named_drivers_addition','named_drivers_removal',
       'vehicle_change','address_change',
       'payment_frequency_change','beneficiary_change_personal_lines',
       'premium_adjustment_voluntary'
     )),
     modification_status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'requested' CHECK (modification_status IN (
       'requested','under_broker_review','customer_signature_pending',
       'insurer_submission_pending','insurer_approved','effective','cancelled'
     )),
     initiated_by VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (initiated_by IN ('customer','broker','automated')),
     scheduled_effective_date DATE,
     completed_at TIMESTAMP,
     impact_summary JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
     cancellation_reason TEXT,
     acaps_modification_reference VARCHAR UNIQUE,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX cm_policy ON contract_modifications (policy_id);
   CREATE INDEX cm_customer ON contract_modifications (customer_id);
   CREATE INDEX cm_status ON contract_modifications (modification_status) WHERE modification_status NOT IN ('effective','cancelled');
   CREATE INDEX cm_initiated ON contract_modifications (created_at DESC);
   
   ALTER TABLE contract_modifications ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY cm_tenant_isolation ON contract_modifications
     USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   ```

   - `src/state-machine/approval-step-transitions.ts` 6 steps

### 10.8.3 -- ContractModificationService + Sprint 41 CRITIQUE (10h) | Deps : 10.8.2

1. Service `ContractModificationService` complete :
   ```typescript
   async requestModification(policyId: string, modificationData: ModificationData, initiatedBy: InitiatedBy): Promise<ContractModification> {
     return await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
       // Validate max 1 active modification per policy
       const activeModifications = await manager.count(ContractModification, {
         where: { policy_id: policyId, modification_status: Not(In(['effective','cancelled'])) }
       });
       
       if (activeModifications >= MODIFICATION_MAX_ACTIVE_PER_POLICY) {
         throw new ConflictException('Active modification already in progress for this policy');
       }
       
       // Create modification
       const modification = await manager.save(ContractModification, {
         policy_id: policyId,
         tenant_id: this.contextTenantId,
         customer_id: modificationData.customer_id,
         modification_type: modificationData.modification_type,
         modification_status: 'requested',
         initiated_by: initiatedBy,
         scheduled_effective_date: modificationData.scheduled_effective_date,
         impact_summary: {}
       });
       
       // Sprint 46 dynamic pricing impact
       const premiumImpact = await this.premiumAdjustmentService.calculateModificationImpact(modification.id);
       
       // Initiate approval workflow
       await this.approvalWorkflowService.initiateApprovalWorkflow(modification.id);
       
       // Sprint 14 event
       this.eventEmitter.emit('contract-modification.requested', {
         modification_id: modification.id,
         policy_id: policyId,
         modification_type: modification.modification_type,
         initiated_by: initiatedBy
       });
       
       // Sprint 9 notifications
       await this.notificationService.notifyModificationRequested(modification);
       
       return modification;
     });
   }
   ```
2. Methods : requestModification + getModificationStatus + cancelModification + listModifications

2. Migrations 7 tables + RLS strict + indexes + UNIQUE :
   ```sql
   CREATE TABLE corporate_customers (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     company_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     ice_number VARCHAR NOT NULL UNIQUE,
     tax_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     headquarters_address JSONB NOT NULL,
     procurement_contact JSONB NOT NULL,
     billing_contact JSONB NOT NULL,
     sla_tier VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bronze' CHECK (sla_tier IN ('bronze','silver','gold','platinum')),
     corporate_size VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (corporate_size IN ('small','medium','large','enterprise')),
     industry_sector VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     total_employees_estimated INTEGER,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX cc_tenant ON corporate_customers (tenant_id);
   CREATE INDEX cc_name ON corporate_customers USING gin(to_tsvector('french', company_name));
   CREATE INDEX cc_sla ON corporate_customers (sla_tier);
   
   ALTER TABLE corporate_customers ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY cc_tenant_isolation ON corporate_customers
     USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   
   CREATE TABLE fleet_policies (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     corporate_customer_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES corporate_customers(id),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     fleet_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     total_vehicles_covered INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
     premium_aggregated NUMERIC(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
     acaps_c6_reference VARCHAR UNIQUE,
     master_policy_status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' CHECK (master_policy_status IN ('draft','active','suspended','expired','cancelled')),
     sla_tier VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     effective_from DATE,
     effective_until DATE,
     billing_frequency VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly' CHECK (billing_frequency IN ('monthly','quarterly','annual')),
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]'
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX fp_corporate ON fleet_policies (corporate_customer_id);
   CREATE INDEX fp_status ON fleet_policies (master_policy_status) WHERE master_policy_status NOT IN ('cancelled','expired');
   CREATE INDEX fp_effective_until ON fleet_policies (effective_until);
   ```

### 10.9.4 -- FleetPolicyService + Sprint 40 Extension CRITIQUE (10h) | Deps : 10.9.3

1. Service `FleetPolicyService` complete :
   ```typescript
   async createFleetPolicy(corporateCustomerId: string, fleetData: FleetData): Promise<FleetPolicy> {
     return await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
       // Validate corporate_customer
       const corporateCustomer = await manager.findOne(CorporateCustomer, {
         where: { id: corporateCustomerId }
       });
       if (!corporateCustomer) throw new NotFoundException('Corporate customer not found');
       
       // Create fleet policy
       const fleetPolicy = await manager.save(FleetPolicy, {
         corporate_customer_id: corporateCustomerId,
         tenant_id: this.contextTenantId,
         fleet_name: fleetData.fleet_name,
         total_vehicles_covered: 0,
         master_policy_status: 'draft',
         sla_tier: corporateCustomer.sla_tier,
         billing_frequency: fleetData.billing_frequency || 'monthly'
       });
       
       // Sprint 35 C6 ACAPS reference
       const acapsReference = await this.complianceService.acapsReferenceGeneration(fleetPolicy.id);
       fleetPolicy.acaps_c6_reference = acapsReference;
       await manager.save(fleetPolicy);
       
       // Sprint 35 C6 form generation
       await this.complianceService.generateC6FormACAPS(fleetPolicy.id);
       
       // Sprint 41 lifecycle integration
       await this.sprint41LifecycleService.initializeFleetLifecycle(fleetPolicy.id);
       
       // Sprint 14 event
       this.eventEmitter.emit('fleet-policy.created', {
         fleet_policy_id: fleetPolicy.id,
         corporate_customer_id: corporateCustomerId,
         acaps_c6_reference: acapsReference
       });
       
       // Sprint 9 notifications
       await this.notificationService.notifyFleetPolicyCreated(fleetPolicy, corporateCustomer);
       
       return fleetPolicy;
     });
   }
   ```

### 10.10.2 -- Entites Telematics + TimescaleDB (10h) | Deps : 10.10.1

1. Creer package `repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/` v1.0.0
2. Migrations 7 tables + RLS strict + indexes + UNIQUE + TimescaleDB hypertable :
   ```sql
   -- Install TimescaleDB extension
   CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS timescaledb;
   
   CREATE TABLE telematics_data_points (
     id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     telematics_device_id UUID NOT NULL,
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
     data_type VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (data_type IN ('speed','acceleration','braking','cornering','mileage','location')),
     raw_data JSONB NOT NULL,
     location_coords POINT,
     processing_status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'raw' CHECK (processing_status IN ('raw','processed','aggregated')),
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     PRIMARY KEY (id, timestamp)
   );
   
   -- Convert to hypertable partitioned by day
   SELECT create_hypertable('telematics_data_points', 'timestamp', chunk_time_interval => INTERVAL '1 day');
   
   CREATE INDEX tdp_device_time ON telematics_data_points (telematics_device_id, timestamp DESC);
   CREATE INDEX tdp_data_type ON telematics_data_points (data_type, timestamp DESC);
   
   ALTER TABLE telematics_data_points ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY tdp_tenant_isolation ON telematics_data_points
     USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   
   CREATE TABLE telematics_devices (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     fleet_vehicle_id UUID REFERENCES fleet_vehicles(id),
     individual_vehicle_id UUID REFERENCES policies(id),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     device_type VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (device_type IN ('obd_ii','mobile_app','embedded_oem_phase11')),
     device_identifier VARCHAR NOT NULL UNIQUE,
     paired_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
     status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (status IN ('active','disconnected','maintenance','decommissioned')),
     last_data_received TIMESTAMP,
     device_manufacturer VARCHAR,
     firmware_version VARCHAR,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     CONSTRAINT vehicle_exclusive CHECK (
       (fleet_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL AND individual_vehicle_id IS NULL) OR
       (fleet_vehicle_id IS NULL AND individual_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL)
     )
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX td_fleet ON telematics_devices (fleet_vehicle_id) WHERE fleet_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL;
   CREATE INDEX td_individual ON telematics_devices (individual_vehicle_id) WHERE individual_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL;
   CREATE INDEX td_status ON telematics_devices (status) WHERE status NOT IN ('decommissioned');
   CREATE INDEX td_last_data ON telematics_devices (last_data_received DESC);
   ```
3. Enums TypeScript stricts (DeviceType + DeviceStatus + DataType + ProcessingStatus + AdjustmentReason)
4. JSONB schemas Zod (raw_data sensor + sub_scores + bias_analysis + telematics_metrics + audit)
5. POINT geometry locations
6. Seeds dans `seeds/`
7. Tests 22+ entites + TimescaleDB hypertable tests
8. Commit : `feat(insurance-telematics-phyd): task 10.10.2 entites + TimescaleDB hypertable`

### 10.10.3 -- TelematicsDeviceService + Sprint 48 CRITIQUE (8h) | Deps : 10.10.2

1. Service `TelematicsDeviceService` complete :
   ```typescript
   async pairDevice(vehicleId: string, deviceData: DeviceData, vehicleType: 'fleet' | 'individual'): Promise<TelematicsDevice> {
     return await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
       // Customer consent check
       if (!await this.consentService.hasCustomerConsent(vehicleId, 'telematics_data_collection')) {
         throw new ForbiddenException('Customer consent required for telematics');
       }
       
       // Generate cryptographic identifier
       const deviceIdentifier = crypto.randomUUID();
       
       // Create device
       const device = await manager.save(TelematicsDevice, {
         fleet_vehicle_id: vehicleType === 'fleet' ? vehicleId : null,
         individual_vehicle_id: vehicleType === 'individual' ? vehicleId : null,
         tenant_id: this.contextTenantId,
         device_type: deviceData.device_type,
         device_identifier: deviceIdentifier,
         paired_at: new Date(),
         status: 'active',
         device_manufacturer: deviceData.manufacturer,
         firmware_version: deviceData.firmware_version
       });
       
       // Sprint 14 event
       this.eventEmitter.emit('telematics-device.paired', {
         device_id: device.id,
         vehicle_id: vehicleId,
         vehicle_type: vehicleType,
         device_identifier: deviceIdentifier
       });
       
       // Sprint 9 customer notification
       await this.notificationService.notifyDevicePaired(device);
       
       // Sprint 35 audit
       await this.complianceAuditService.logEvent({
         event_type: 'telematics.device.paired',
         resource_id: device.id,
         vehicle_id: vehicleId,
         user_id: this.contextUserId
       });
       
       return device;
     });
   }
   ```
2. Methods : pairDevice + disconnectDevice + getDeviceStatus + listDevicesForVehicle
3. Cryptographic device_identifier crypto.randomUUID
4. Sprint 48 FleetVehicle + Sprint 40 individual integration
5. Sprint 35 security hardening
6. Sprint 14 events
7. Sprint 9 customer notifications
8. Tests 16+ scenarios
9. Commit : `feat(insurance-telematics-phyd): task 10.10.3 TelematicsDeviceService + Sprint 48`

### 10.11.2 -- Entites Cross-Sell (7 tables) (10h) | Deps : 10.11.1

1. Creer package `repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/` v1.0.0
2. Migrations 7 tables + RLS strict + indexes + UNIQUE :
   ```sql
   CREATE TABLE cross_sell_recommendations (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     customer_id UUID NOT NULL,
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     recommendation_type VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (recommendation_type IN ('auto_to_health','auto_to_life','auto_to_property','health_to_life','multi_product_bundle')),
     recommended_product VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     scoring_factors JSONB NOT NULL,
     confidence_score NUMERIC(5,2) CHECK (confidence_score >= 0 AND confidence_score <= 100),
     status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending','presented','accepted','declined','expired')),
     presented_at TIMESTAMP,
     responded_at TIMESTAMP,
     algorithm_version VARCHAR NOT NULL,
     bias_check_passed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
     generated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
     UNIQUE (customer_id, recommendation_type, generated_at)
   );
   
   CREATE INDEX csr_customer ON cross_sell_recommendations (customer_id);
   CREATE INDEX csr_status ON cross_sell_recommendations (status) WHERE status NOT IN ('declined','expired');
   CREATE INDEX csr_confidence ON cross_sell_recommendations (confidence_score DESC);
   
   ALTER TABLE cross_sell_recommendations ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
   CREATE POLICY csr_tenant_isolation ON cross_sell_recommendations
     USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid);
   
   CREATE TABLE product_bundles (
     id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     tenant_id UUID NOT NULL,
     bundle_name VARCHAR NOT NULL UNIQUE,
     bundle_description TEXT,
     products_included VARCHAR[] NOT NULL CHECK (products_included <@ ARRAY['auto','health','life','property']),
     discount_percent NUMERIC(5,2) CHECK (discount_percent >= 5 AND discount_percent <= 20),
     eligibility_rules JSONB NOT NULL,
     commercial_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
     acaps_bundle_reference VARCHAR,
     effective_from DATE,
     effective_until DATE,
     audit_trail JSONB DEFAULT '[]'
   );
   ```
3. Enums TypeScript stricts
4. JSONB schemas Zod
5. Seeds dans `seeds/`
6. Tests 22+ entites
7. Commit : `feat(insurance-embedded-cross-sell): task 10.11.2 7 entites + UNIQUE + seeds`

### 10.11.3 -- RecommendationEngine + Sprint 42/49 Fusion CRITIQUE (12h) | Deps : 10.11.2

1. Service `CrossSellRecommendationEngine` complete :
   ```typescript
   async generateRecommendations(customerId: string): Promise<CrossSellRecommendation[]> {
     return await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
       // Sprint 42 churn prediction reuse
       const churnScore = await this.sprint42ChurnService.getChurnScore(customerId);
       
       // Sprint 49 PHYD behavioral data reuse
       const behavioralScore = await this.sprint49PHYDService.getDriverBehaviorScore(customerId);
       
       // Customer profile
       const customerProfile = await this.customerService.getCustomerProfile(customerId);
       
       // Run recommendation engine 6 modules
       const factors = {
         churn_score: churnScore,
         behavioral_score: behavioralScore,
         customer_profile: customerProfile,
         tenure_factor: this.tenureEvaluator.evaluate(customerProfile),
         premium_capacity: this.premiumCapacityEvaluator.evaluate(customerProfile),
         bundle_eligibility: this.bundleEvaluator.evaluate(customerProfile)
       };
       
       const recommendations = this.compositeScorer.score(factors);
       
       // Filter by confidence threshold
       const qualifyingRecs = recommendations.filter(r => r.confidence_score >= CROSS_SELL_RECOMMENDATIONS_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD);
       
       // Limit per customer
       const topRecs = qualifyingRecs.slice(0, CROSS_SELL_RECOMMENDATIONS_PER_CUSTOMER_MAX);
       
       // Save with bias check
       const saved = [];
       for (const rec of topRecs) {
         const biasCheckPassed = await this.applyBiasCheck(rec, customerProfile);
         if (biasCheckPassed) {
           const recEntity = await manager.save(CrossSellRecommendation, {
             customer_id: customerId,
             tenant_id: this.contextTenantId,
             recommendation_type: rec.type,
             recommended_product: rec.product,
             scoring_factors: factors,
             confidence_score: rec.confidence_score,
             status: 'pending',
             algorithm_version: CROSS_SELL_RECOMMENDATIONS_ALGORITHM_VERSION,
             bias_check_passed: true
           });
           saved.push(recEntity);
           
           // Sprint 14 event
           this.eventEmitter.emit('cross-sell.recommendation.generated', {
             recommendation_id: recEntity.id,
             customer_id: customerId,
             confidence_score: rec.confidence_score
           });
         }
       }
       
       return saved;
     });
   }
   ```
2. Recommendation engine 6 modules `src/recommendation-engine/`
3. Methods : generateRecommendations + getRecommendationsForCustomer + updateRecommendationStatus + applyBiasCheck
4. Worker daily 03h00 MA
5. Sprint 42 + Sprint 49 fusion
6. Bias monitoring + Sprint 35 audit
7. Sprint 13 cross_sell_recommendations_mv
8. Tests 24+ scenarios
9. Commit : `feat(insurance-embedded-cross-sell): task 10.11.3 RecommendationEngine + Sprint 42/49`
